nodes.name: Extract from File — PDF to Text

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "llama-3.3-70b-versatile",
  "temperature": 0.1,
  "max_tokens": 600,
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "system",
      "content": "You are an expert invoice data extraction AI. Extract structured data from invoice text and return ONLY a raw JSON object — no markdown, no backticks, no explanation.

Always return exactly this format:
{
  "invoice_number": "string or null",
  "invoice_date": "YYYY-MM-DD or null",
  "due_date": "YYYY-MM-DD or null",
  "vendor_name": "string or null",
  "vendor_email": "string or null",
  "vendor_address": "string or null",
  "bill_to": "company/person being billed or null",
  "subtotal": number or null,
  "tax_amount": number or null,
  "tax_rate": "string percentage or null",
  "total_amount": number or null,
  "currency": "USD/EUR/GBP/PKR etc or null",
  "payment_terms": "string or null",
  "line_items": [{"description": "string", "quantity": number, "unit_price": number, "total": number}],
  "notes": "any important notes or null",
  "confidence": "High/Medium/Low based on how clear the text was"
}

For amounts, return numbers only (no currency symbols). If a field is not found, use null. For dates, convert to YYYY-MM-DD format."
    },
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": "Extract all invoice data from this PDF text:

{{ $json.pdfText }}"
    }
  ]
}

parameters.subject: =⚠️ Invoice extraction failed — {{ $json.attachment_name }}
=Re: {{ $json.email_subject }} — Invoice Received ✅

json.snippet: Please find attached our invoice for services rendered in June 2026.
json.subject: Invoice #INV-2026-0042 from Tech Solutions Ltd

attachments.content:
INVOICE

Tech Solutions Ltd
123 Business Park, Karachi, Pakistan
billing@techsolutions.com

Invoice Number: INV-2026-0042
Invoice Date: June 20, 2026
Due Date: July 20, 2026

Bill To:
Your Company Name
456 Office Street, Lahore, Pakistan

Payment Terms: Net 30

Line Items:
1. Web Development Services    10 hours @ PKR 5,000    PKR 50,000
2. UI/UX Design                5 hours  @ PKR 4,000    PKR 20,000
3. Server Setup & Configuration 1 unit  @ PKR 15,000   PKR 15,000

Subtotal:    PKR 85,000
Tax (17%):   PKR 14,450
Total:       PKR 99,450

Bank Details:
Bank: Meezan Bank
Account: 0123-4567890-01
IBAN: PK12MEZN0001234567890101

Notes: Payment via bank transfer only. Please include invoice number in reference.
